In a dimly lit room, a man in a grey hoodie walks up to another man sitting on a couch. The man on the couch, wearing a dark blue zip-up, is engrossed in his phone. The man in the hoodie holds a small, orange and brown object, possibly a wallet or case, and asks him a question. The seated man looks up, dismisses the offer, and then looks back down at his phone, gesturing with his thumb.; speech: Man in hoodie: Hey man! Do you want some cream? transcript_segments.text: What are you talking about? Are you crazy? Wait. Is it like the one we see in a movie? Can we time travel?

It is based on quantum physics. There's a quasi-stable antimatter inside. It's placed with the fabric of the space-time. It's starting into a complex. How do we know this works? Wait and watch. Setting the radius to one meter north. Geo coordinates intact.

dense_caption.overall_summary: A man in a white hazmat suit holds up a small, wooden object with a 'M' logo on it, looking shocked. The scene cuts to two other men, one in a green hoodie and one in a blue turtleneck, who look on with serious expressions. The man in the hazmat suit then reveals a large, homemade machine with a glass dome, labeled 'TIME MACHINE,' and explains that it works as a time-freezing device.; speech: Man in hazmat suit: Whaa.. what happened?! ...it works as a... transcript_segments.text: What the? Like I said, it works. It's a time freezing machine. Freezing? What is your plan? We're going to rob a bank. In broad daylight. A big high street. Split three ways. Pack up the gears. It's time. I don't trust you. Maybe you never froze the time. You had an ice cream before. Just a sleight of hand. Alright. Not this one.
Just turn off the antenna and press this button. Alright buddy, we're gonna rob. You stay here, we split two ways. Safety always. I want this.

transcript_segments.text: What the? Like I said, it works. It's a time freezing machine. Freezing? What is your plan? We're going to rob a bank. In broad daylight. A big high street. Split three ways. Pack up the gears. It's time. I don't trust you. Maybe you never froze the time. You had an ice cream before. Just a sleight of hand. Alright. Not this one.
Just turn off the antenna and press this button. Alright buddy, we're gonna rob. You stay here, we split two ways. Safety always. I want this.
